title: spread

messages.description: output to an outlet as the result of the comparison

flags.name: -mode <f>
flags.description:
sets mode, 0 and 1 (in reverse to [moses])
default: 0

body: Similar to [moses], [spread] compares an incoming float to the arguments and spreads to different outputs. One difference to [moses] is that it takes multiple arguments and has an extra mode.
